hero.description: Discover texts matched to your level. From beginner stories to advanced articles—read, learn, and grow with our adaptive learning platform.

levels.title: Choose Your Level
levels.subtitle: From beginner to advanced—find content that matches your skills

intermediate.title: Intermediate (B1-B2)
intermediate.description: Articles and narratives with richer vocabulary

howItWorks.title: How LinguaRead Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Your journey to English fluency in four simple steps

1.title: Choose Your Level
1.description: Select from 4 difficulty levels that match your current English proficiency. Our smart system adapts recommendations based on your progress.

2.title: Read & Learn
2.description: Read engaging texts with instant translations, vocabulary highlights, and pronunciation guides. Click any word to learn more.

3.title: Track Progress
3.description: Monitor your reading streak, vocabulary growth, and comprehension scores. Celebrate milestones as you improve.

4.title: Add Your Texts
4.description: Contribute by adding your own texts. Help others learn while practicing writing skills. Our community reviews all submissions.

cta.title: Start Your Reading Journey Today
cta.description: Join thousands of learners improving their English through daily reading. It's free to get started.
